                                  Plan: acme-lab-minimal                                  
┏━━━━━━━━┳━━━━━━━━━━━━━┳━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━┳━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━┳━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━┳━━━━━━┓
┃ Action ┃ Type        ┃ uid_ref              ┃ Title            ┃ Keeper UID     ┃ Note ┃
┡━━━━━━━━╇━━━━━━━━━━━━━╇━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━╇━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━╇━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━╇━━━━━━┩
│ create │ pamMachine  │ acme-lab-linux2      │ lab-linux-2      │ -              │      │
│ update │ pamUser     │ acme-lab-linux1-root │ lab-linux-1-root │ UID-USER-001   │      │
│ delete │ pamDatabase │ old-db               │ old-db           │ UID-DELETE-001 │      │
└────────┴─────────────┴──────────────────────┴──────────────────┴────────────────┴──────┘
+1 create, ~1 update, -1 delete, !1 conflict, ·2 noop
